svg.title: Maximal Novelty Research Framework — MESMI
svg.desc: Full pipeline diagram for Multimodal Explainable Stress and Meditation Intelligence with seven novel contributions
svg.text: MESMI — Maximal Novelty Architecture
Layer 1 — Multimodal input

g.text: ICA artifact removal · Signal-adaptive bandpass · Z-score normalisation per window

svg.text: ★ Novelty 1 — CEEMDAN replaces EMD

g.text: Complete Ensemble EMD w/ Adaptive Noise
Hurst exponent + kurtosis gating per signal

svg.text: ★ Novelty 2 — Dual Nonlinear Geometry Engine
★ Novelty 3 — Physiological Cross-Modal Graph (PCG)
★ Novelty 4 — Dual-Stream Temporal Encoder
concat
★ Novelty 5 — Physiology-Constrained Training

g.text: SNS / PNS ratio encoded in loss

svg.text: ★ Novelty 6 — Continuous Biomarker Scores (not just class labels)
★ Novelty 7 — Causal + Contrastive Explainability

g.text: Auto-generated clinical narrative from XAI outputs · HRV / EDA / Alpha-Theta band linkage to known biomarkers

svg.text: Seven Novel Contributions at a Glance
N1: CEEMDAN replaces EMD — eliminates mode mixing, provides complete orthogonal basis; statistically superior for nonstationary biomedical signals
N2: Dual geometry engine — adds RQA (recurrence quantification) + multiscale entropy to PSR; captures determinism and complexity jointly
N3: Physiological Cross-modal Graph — models dynamic coherence and causality between modalities, not just concatenation
N4: Dual-stream encoder — BiLSTM for within-modality time, Graph Transformer for cross-modal context; combines both dimensions
N5: Physiology-constrained loss — domain knowledge (ANS physiology) baked into training, not just post-hoc; forces physiologically valid predictions
N6: Continuous multi-target output — stress score + meditation depth + recovery index + autonomic balance; not a simple 2-class problem
N7: Causal + contrastive XAI — NOTEARS causal DAG discovery + contrastive explanations ("why A, not B"); far beyond SHAP alone
NEW markers: Additional signals (HRV+SpO2) and autonomic balance index are proposed additions to the original plan
One-line summary: CEEMDAN + Dual Geometry + PCG-GNN + Dual-Stream Encoder + Physics Loss + Causal XAI
